titleEn: AgriFood Signals: InvestEco closes fourth fund, Bayer consolidates US glyphosate arm, Nestlé ditches artificial colors
titleZh: AgriFood Signals：InvestEco完成第四支基金募集，拜耳整合美国草甘膦业务，雀巢弃用人工色素
summaryZh: 本期AgriFood Signals汇总了农业食品科技领域的重要融资、并购、合作及行业动态。亮点包括：荷兰The Protein Brewery在FDA GRAS认证受阻后仍获2050万美元融资；德国Stenon获2050万美元用于氮管理以应对肥料涨价；加拿大InvestEco完成1.06亿加元第四支基金募集；拜耳将美国草甘膦业务整合为独立实体Ruveon；雀巢宣布全球范围内弃用人工色素。此外，还有多项精准农业、替代蛋白、动物福利技术等领域的投资与合作。
translationZh:
AgFunderNews汇总了农业科技和食品科技领域最重要的融资、并购、关闭及行业动态。

**融资新闻**

🇳🇱 The Protein Brewery表示FDA GRAS认证挫折不会影响其美国计划，同时完成2050万美元B轮扩展融资。AgFunderNews

🇩🇪 Stenon获得2050万美元，通过更好的氮管理来应对肥料价格上涨。AgFunderNews

🇹🇳 突尼斯的RoboCare从216 Capital获得六位数投资。Wamda

🇧🇷 亚马逊投资可持续航空燃料生产商GranBio。ESG Today

🇮🇹 锡拉丘兹的Archimede完成150万欧元种子轮融资，用于远程基础设施监控。EU Startups

🇮🇱 ProFuse Technology筹集150万美元，以应对GLP-1时代的肌肉流失问题。AgFunderNews

Kelli Wilson（左）和Deniz Ficicioglu（右）。图片来源：Bayou Best Foods

**并购、IPO及合作**

🇺🇸 Sabanto和Verdant Robotics整合自主性与精准施药系统。Future Farming [披露：AgFunderNews的母公司AgFunder是Verdant的投资方。]

🇸🇦 🇬🇷 Foodics完成对希腊Norma AI的100%收购。Saudi Foodtech

🇺🇸 SilvaBio和Foray Bioscience合作，将美洲栗从功能性灭绝中恢复。Dealroom

🇺🇸 Biosphere在气体发酵洗牌中收购NovoNutrients资产。AgFunderNews

🇺🇸 Bayou Best Foods收购BettaF!sh，以建立植物基海鲜的全球影响力。AgFunderNews

**基金、资助及加速器**

🇨🇦 InvestEco完成第四支基金募集，规模为1.06亿加元。Agri Investor

🇺🇸 Food System Innovations推出200万美元实验室，以加速可持续蛋白质开发。Green Queen

🇬🇧 ‘Food & Nature Resilience Fund’旨在帮助扩大英国再生农业的投资规模。Farming Online

🇺🇸 Spring Innovation Fund作为首家专注于动物福利技术的风险慈善机构首次亮相。AgFunderNews

**人事变动**

🇨🇭 先正达集团任命Hengde Qin为首席执行官。Lincoln Journal

🇺🇸 Ohalo任命种子行业资深人士Justin Wolfe为总裁兼首席运营官。PR Newswire

🇳🇴 Nofence任命GEOSYS创始人Damien Lepoutre为董事长，公司着眼于数据驱动增长。iGrow News

Zachary Abbott博士，ZBiotics创始人兼CEO。图片来源：Elaine Watson

**其他新闻**

🇫🇷 雀巢将在全球范围内率先弃用人工色素。Food Navigator

🇺🇸 Wildtype转向Kickstarter，首次直接面向消费者推广培养三文鱼冷熏和细胞源护肤品。Cultivated X

🇫🇷 Parima通过与Vow的合作，验证了具有成本效益的商业化培养肉生产。Green Queen

🇩🇪 拜耳集团将美国草甘膦业务整合为一个独立实体，以Ruveon名义运营。Bayer

🇺🇸 ZBiotics通过销售超过1500万份‘饮酒前’益生菌，将转基因益生菌推向主流。AgFunderNews

分享本文 LinkedIn X Facebook Email

订阅我们的每周通讯。

从‘谨慎乐观’到‘空话’，农业食品界对美国再生农业行政命令发表看法。Agtech政策与监管

独家：ProFuse Technology筹集150万美元，以应对GLP-1时代的肌肉流失问题
featuredReason: 本期汇总涵盖了精准农业、替代蛋白、动物福利技术等多个与智慧畜牧相关的投资与合作动态，为行业人士提供了宏观趋势和资本流向的参考。
contentFull: AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇳🇱 The Protein Brewery says FDA GRAS setback won’t derail US plans as it raises $20.5m Series B extension AgFunderNews 🇩🇪 Stenon bags $20.5m to combat fertilizer price hikes with better nitrogen management AgFunderNews 🇹🇳 Tunisia’s RoboCare secures six-figure investment from 216 Capital Wamda 🇧🇷 Amazon invests in sustainable aviation fuel producer GranBio ESG Today 🇮🇹 Syracuse-based Archimede closes €1.5 million Seed round for remote infrastructure monitoring EU Startups 🇮🇱 ProFuse Technology raises $1.5m to tackle muscle loss in the GLP-1 era AgFunderNews Kelli Wilson (left) and Deniz Ficicioglu (right). Image credit: Bayou Best Foods M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇺🇸 Sabanto and Verdant Robotics integrate autonomy and precision application systems Future Farming [Disclosure: AgFunderNews’ parent company AgFunder is an investor in Verdant.] 🇸🇦 🇬🇷 Foodics completes 100% takeover of Greece’s Norma AI Saudi Foodtech 🇺🇸 SilvaBio and Foray Bioscience partner to restore American chestnut from functional extinction Dealroom 🇺🇸 Biosphere picks up NovoNutrients assets in gas fermentation shakeout AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 Bayou Best Foods acquires BettaF!sh to build global presence in plant-based seafood AgFunderNews Funds, grants & accelerators 🇨🇦 InvestEco closes fourth fund on C$106m Agri Investor 🇺🇸 Food System Innovations unveils $2m lab to speed up sustainable protein development Green Queen 🇬🇧 ‘Food & Nature Resilience Fund’ to help scale investment in UK regenerative farming Farming Online 🇺🇸 Spring Innovation Fund debuts as first venture philanthropy firm dedicated to animal welfare tech AgFunderNews People moves 🇨🇭 Syngenta Group appoints Hengde Qin as chief executive officer Lincoln Journal 🇺🇸 Ohalo names seed industry veteran Justin Wolfe as president and chief operating officer PR Newswire 🇳🇴 Nofence appoints GEOSYS founder Damien Lepoutre as chairman as company eyes data-driven growth iGrow News Zachary Abbott, PhD. founder and CEO, ZBiotics. Image credit: Elaine Watson Other news 🇫🇷 Nestlé to axe artificial colours worldwide in industry first Food Navigator 🇺🇸 Wildtype turns to Kickstarter for first direct-to-consumer push with cultivated salmon lox and cell-derived skincare Cultivated X 🇫🇷 Parima validates cost-effective commercial cultivated meat production with Vow partnership Green Queen 🇩🇪 Bayer Group to consolidate U.S. glyphosate business into distinct entity operating as Ruveon Bayer 🇺🇸 ZBiotics takes GM probiotics mainstream with 15m+ ‘pre-alcohol’ shots sold AgFunderNews Share this article LinkedInXFacebookEmail Sign up for our weekly newsletter. author: Jennifer Marston
